div.div:
Load Config
discover.py eval configs
1 auto, many ask user
read mlflow.experiment
dataset.path + schema, judges

div.div:
Verify MLflow
ensure_server() reachable?
URI: eval.yaml > env > :5000
remote set: proceed anyway
else suggest /eval-setup

div.div:
Sync Dataset
two-phase (LLM + script)
read dataset.schema + sample
interpret → schema_mapping.json
sync_dataset.py validates + preview
push records to MLflow dataset

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 269px; margin-left: 1010px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Log Results
log_results.py --run-id
params: skill, runner, model
metrics: per-judge mean/pass_rate,
duration, cost, tokens
artifacts: summary.yaml + table
one trace per case / run

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 429px; margin-left: 1010px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Push Feedback
attach_feedback.py --source all
judge: source_type=CODE
({case}/{judge}) from summary.yaml
human: source_type=HUMAN
({case}/human_review) from review.yaml
no traces? report 0, succeed

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 599px; margin-left: 1010px;

div.div:
Pull Feedback
attach_feedback.py --action pull
read UI annotations on traces
write review.yaml mlflow_feedback
separate from local human review
consumed by /eval-optimize

MLflow Server
external service
dataset registry
runs: params, metrics, artifacts
traces + feedback
annotation UI ($MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI)

pushed N / pulled N feedback
